June 28, 2026 metawriting

Hello, World!

The start of my blog.

Welcome to my blog! This is where I’ll write about cool things that I’m building.

What to expect

I plan to write about:

  • Projects I’m working on and lessons learned along the way
  • My thoughts or opinions on different tools and technologies.

Why blog at all?

I got inspired by reading a blog by one of my friends. It’s also a fun way for me to inform people of the cool stuff that I’m working on.
